     The Numbers Business Report

Joy Ride (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,897,789Details
International Box Office $2,620,847
Worldwide Box Office $15,518,636
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $325,202
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $480,687
Total $805,889
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When Audrey’s business trip to Asia goes sideways, she enlists the aid of Lolo, her irreverent, childhood best friend who also happens to be a hot mess; Kat, her college friend turned Chinese soap star; and Deadeye, Lolo’s eccentric cousin. Their no-holds-barred, epic experience becomes a journey of bonding, friendship, belonging, and wild debauchery that reveals the universal truth of what it means to know and love who you are.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,806,277 (45.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.22 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:83.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,820 opening theaters/2,820 max. theaters, 2.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $14,100,326

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 7th, 2023 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: July 5th, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
July 5th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
July 6th, 2023 (Wide) (Singapore)
July 6th, 2023 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
July 6th, 2023 (Wide) (Oman)
Video Release: July 28th, 2023 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong and crude sexual content, language throughout, drug content and brief graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2790 (cert #53514), 7/5/2023)
Running Time: 94 minutes
Filming location (country): Canada
Plot point: Adopted Family Seeking Reunion
Social setting: Adopted Family
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Target audience: Asian-Americans
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Point Grey, Red Mysterious Hippo
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
